FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Abandoned Outpost
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Scouts have discovered an abandoned outpost near one of your settlements. The structure is weathered, but intact; whoever built it left in a hurry. The site could be repurposed in several ways, depending on your priorities.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Strip it for materials. Everything useful goes back to the settlement.
Fortify it as a watchtower. Good defensive position.
Convert it into a workshop. More production capacity is always welcome.
Restore it as a waystation for travelers and traders.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Outpost Salvaged
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Work crews methodically dismantle the outpost, recovering usable building materials, forgotten supplies, and a few valuable items the previous occupants left behind. The haul is respectable.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Watchtower Established
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The outpost is reinforced and garrisoned as a forward observation post. Its elevated position provides excellent sightlines, giving your settlement early warning of approaching threats and a defensive staging area.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Workshop Opened
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The outpost is renovated into a functioning workshop. New workbenches and tool racks are installed, and workers begin using the space immediately. The additional production capacity is a welcome boost to the settlement's output.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Waystation Restored
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The restored waystation quickly becomes a hub for passing travelers and traders. A small permanent staff maintains the facilities, and the increased foot traffic brings new trade opportunities and a few settlers looking to put down roots.

FactionColonies.FCOptionDef.label: Convert it to a healing house. Tend to travelers and the sick.
Strip it bare. Take everything that isn't nailed down, then take the nails.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Healing House
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: The outpost is transformed into a place of healing. Clean beds, medicinal herb gardens, and a small staff of medics welcome the sick and injured from across the region. The settlement's reputation as a compassionate community grows, and the medical knowledge gained from treating diverse ailments improves local healthcare.

FactionColonies.FCEventDef.label: Outpost Ransacked
FactionColonies.FCEventDef.desc: Your scavengers tear through the outpost with practiced efficiency, prying up floorboards, checking hollow walls, and dismantling anything of value. They find caches the previous occupants hid, materials embedded in the structure itself, and items that a more careful salvage operation would have overlooked. The haul is impressive.
